name: HPV Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for human papillomavirus (HPV) vaccines. Used in adolescent immunization (IMA) measures. Requires 2-3 dose series depending on age at initiation.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Human papillomavirus vaccine, types 6, 11, 16, 18, quadrivalent (4vHPV), 3 dose schedule, for intramuscular use
Human papillomavirus vaccine, types 16, 18, bivalent (2vHPV), 3 dose schedule, for intramuscular use
Human papillomavirus vaccine, types 6, 11, 16, 18, 31, 33, 45, 52, 58, 9-valent (9vHPV), 2 or 3 dose schedule, for intramuscular use
